nasb.text: They will say of Me, ‘Only in the Lord are righteousness and strength.’ Men will come to Him, And all who were angry at Him will be put to shame.

esv.text: “Only in the Lord, it shall be said of me, are righteousness and strength; to him shall come and be ashamed all who were incensed against him.

cnv.text: 人論到我必說：‘只有在耶和華裡面才有公義和能力’； 向他發怒的，都必來到他面前，並且要蒙羞。

ccb.text: 他们必说， ‘只有耶和华那里才有公义和能力。’” 向祂发怒的必在祂面前蒙羞。

csbs.text: 人论到我，就说： ‘公义、能力唯独在于耶和华！’” 人必来到他那里； 所有对他发怒的，都必蒙羞。
